_meta.title: CA SAM / TX DIR / TX-RAMP State RMF Variant Stub
_meta.description: Seed for state-level RMF variant. California SAM (Statewide Administrative Manual) requires 800-53 Moderate + CA privacy overlay. Texas DIR (Department of Information Resources) uses TX-RAMP for cloud services, mapping to 800-53 with state-specific controls. This stub provides the crosswalk anchors.

state_specific_controls.description: Texas-specific access control: requires annual LEO background check for CJIS-adjacent systems
Texas audit log retention: minimum 7 years for state agency systems
TX-RAMP requires vendor attestation of unsupported component remediation plan

ca_sam_anchors.description: CA SAM 5305-A: privacy notice required for all state systems processing PII
CA SAM 5320: quarterly vulnerability scanning for moderate systems

crosswalk_notes: This stub provides anchor mappings for CA SAM Section 5300 (Information Security) and TX DIR / TX-RAMP Level 1-2 controls. Full mapping requires consultation with CA Department of Technology (CDT) and TX DIR published standards. The state-specific controls are additive to the 800-53 baseline; they do not replace federal controls.
